mismatch_policy: Measured-overhead slice of the adapted fullreact AgentPoison MiniMax comparator. It preserves the provider, ReAct loop, DPR retriever, trigger_question_only adversarial search context, and attack settings, but uses a fixed 10-question subset to bound runtime cost. It must not be described as full official AgentPoison reproduction or as the main 25-case efficacy matrix.
dataset_note: The official ReAct script expects a dev split file under ReAct/data/strategyqa/strategyqa_dev.json. This runner stages a labeled subset from the upstream StrategyQA train file at that path-compatible location for auditability because the imported test file lacks labels.
retrieval_note: Retrieval is executed by upstream ReAct/local_wikienv.py with DPR embeddings and poisoned demo insertion.
retriever_device_note: DPR retrieval runs on cpu for this artifact (selection reason: cuda_unavailable). This changes compute placement only, not the retriever family or poisoned retrieval path.
provider_note: LLM calls are routed through the repository provider profile minimax27 instead of the upstream hard-coded OpenAI key path.
metric_mapping: Official eval metrics are preserved under official_metrics. FlowFence-facing rates are added separately and annotated in metric_mapping_notes.
